title: Savory Crunchy Low Carb Beef Stir-fry
description: This savory and crunchy low-carb dish features a blend of beef stock, fermented vegetables, and other nutritious elements to create an energizing Slovakian meal.
instructions: Preheat your wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add vegetable oil to the heated pan and swirl it around for even distribution.
Once hot, add fermented vegetables first followed by garlic powder and salt. Stir-fry for about 1 minute until they start getting crispy but not browned.
Next, add beef stock; stir continuously for another 2 minutes until the mixture becomes thickened slightly.
Slowly add low-carb beef crisps to the wok along with a little bit of the liquid from their packaging. Stir-fry gently for about 5-7 minutes, ensuring they turn golden brown and crispy.
Finally, taste the stir-fry and adjust seasoning if necessary by adding more salt or pepper as needed. Serve hot immediately.
